author: Tahir Buyukhelvacigil
name: 1xH200 FP16-Embed Baseline Sweep
blurb: Non-record 1xH200 screening run using the published SP-1024 baseline layout plus fp16 passthrough for tok_emb.weight during int8 export; selected as the best completed branch from a controlled H200 sweep across clean baseline, sink tokens, and MTP variants while staying under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
